tagline: We make pool ownership fun, healthy, and Hassle Free

hero.headline:
60+ Years Keeping South Shore
Pools Sparkling
hero.subheadline: Your family has trusted South Shore Pool Supply since 1964 for a reason. We handle every detail — openings, closings, weekly care, repairs — so you never worry about your pool. Just enjoy it.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From our Cohasset retail store to your backyard, South Shore Pool Supply is your one-stop shop for supplies, service, and expert advice. We have been doing this since 1964.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Professional seasonal preparation in spring and full winterization in fall. We protect your investment so your pool is swim-ready the moment warm weather arrives.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Our hassle-free weekly program covers cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks. Your pool stays sparkling all season without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt chlorine generators, lights — our trained technicians diagnose and fix it right. Over 60 years of hands-on repair experience.

cards.title: Safety Covers
cards.description: Professional measurement, sales, and installation of safety covers. Protect your pool and your family during the off-season with a perfect-fit cover.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Care
cards.description: Complete hot tub maintenance including cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment servicing. Keep your spa in top condition year-round.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemicals
cards.description: Bring a sample to our Cohasset store for free professional water analysis. Walk out with the exact chemicals and a clear plan to balance your water.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Hassle-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Visit Our Store
steps.description: Stop by our Cohasset location or give us a call. We will talk through what your pool needs and put together an honest, no-pressure plan tailored to your situation.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our trained pool specialists handle openings, closings, weekly maintenance, repairs, and chemical balancing. You get a well-maintained pool without the guesswork.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool All Season
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is in the hands of a team that has been doing this for 62 years. Crystal clear water, working equipment, and zero stress.

about.label: Why South Shore Families Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Founded in 1964 — Still Family-Focused Today
about.description: When Dave and Bobbi Hall built their first swimming pool in 1964, they did not plan on starting a business. But after Bobbi began teaching swim lessons to pay for the pool, a passion for pool care took root. Six decades later, South Shore Pool Supply is still serving the community from our retail store on Route 3A in Cohasset. Our trained specialists treat every pool like it is their own, because many of them grew up swimming in South Shore pools too.

features.title: 60+ Years of Local Expertise
features.description: We have served the South Shore since 1964 — longer than any competitor. That experience means we have seen every pool problem and know exactly how to fix it.

features.title: Retail Store + Full Service
features.description: We are your one-stop shop: walk into our Cohasset store for free water testing and supplies, or call us for full-service maintenance and repairs at your home.

features.title: Hassle-Free Pool Ownership
features.description: Our comprehensive maintenance programs are designed so you never have to think about your pool. We handle everything — you just enjoy swimming.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your needs. From a single opening to full-season care, we keep it simple and honest.

guarantee.headline: Our "Hassle-Free" Promise
guarantee.description: If any service visit does not meet your expectations, call us and we will come back to make it right at no extra charge. We have been earning trust on the South Shore for over 60 years — and we plan to keep it that way. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: When should I schedule my pool opening?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking your spring opening in March or early April to secure your preferred date. Our season fills up fast — some longtime customers book a year in advance. Call early and we will get you on the schedule.

faqs.question: Can I just bring in a water sample for free testing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bring a water sample to our store at 754 Chief Justice Cushing Hwy (Route 3A) in Cohasset anytime during business hours. Our team will run a professional analysis and give you clear recommendations — completely free.

faqs.question: What does your weekly maintenance program include?
faqs.answer: Our hassle-free weekly program includes surface skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical testing and balancing, filter inspection, and a full equipment check. We send a service summary after every visit so you always know the status of your pool.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs and spas too?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide complete hot tub maintenance including cleaning, water chemistry balancing, filter changes, and equipment repair. Many of our pool customers bundle their spa care with us for convenience.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve on the South Shore?
faqs.answer: We serve Cohasset, Scituate, Hingham, Marshfield, Norwell, Duxbury, Hanover, Hull, Pembroke, Rockland, and neighboring South Shore Massachusetts towns. If you are not sure whether we cover your area, just give us a call.

testimonials.name: Russell P.
testimonials.text: This company is awesome, very fast service. Well trained pool specialists. They make pool ownership truly hassle-free.

testimonials.name: Robert D.
testimonials.text: Great work by the team for our pool opening. Fast, efficient and thorough. They clearly know what they are doing after 60+ years in business.

testimonials.name: Richard S.
testimonials.text: South Shore Pool Supply developed a plan to convert my above ground pool from Baquacil to chlorine. After two weeks the water was perfectly clear. Extremely knowledgeable team.

contact.subtitle: Call us, stop by our Cohasset store, or request a quote online. We have been helping South Shore families enjoy their pools since 1964.
benefits: Free water testing at our Cohasset store
